balanceInput.infoMessage: Current balance is the amount available in your account (or the debt amount if it is a debt account). If you manually change the current balance, Monohroshi will create a Balance Correction transaction that will affect your expenses or income.

welcome.title: Your money under control
welcome.subtitle: Manage expenses, income and cards in one place.

financialFeeling.question: How do you feel about your finances today?

financialFeeling.confident: Confident — ready for my TED talk

whyWeAsk.title: Why we ask
whyWeAsk.subtitle: Your answers stay private and help us make Monohroshi actually useful for you.

personalization.title: Personalized experience
personalization.description: We tailor budgets, categories, and goals to fit your situation from day one.

aiInsights.title: Smarter AI insights
aiInsights.description: Our AI spots patterns in your finances and gives you suggestions that actually make sense for your life.

recommendations.title: Better recommendations
recommendations.description: Savings goals, spending limits, and habits — all suggested based on what you've told us.

privacy.title: Private & secure
privacy.description: Your answers are stored securely and never shared with third parties.

notifications.title: Users who turn on reminders are 2x more consistent
notifications.subtitle: Monohroshi helps you build strong financial habits by reminding you to check in, track progress, and stay on track — just a few seconds a week.

socialProof.title: 85% of users reach their goal with Monohroshi
socialProof.subtitle: Whether your goal is keeping your finances under control, improving spending habits or saving up for a vacation, Monohroshi is here for you.

signup.title: Welcome to Monohroshi
signup.subtitle: Sign in to sync your data and unlock personalized insights.
